positive: A cinematic, highly detailed cyberpunk cityscape viewed from a rain-slicked rooftop. Towering skyscrapers are draped in neon holographic advertisements and intricate wiring. Flying vehicles zip through the smoggy atmosphere. Use deep blues, vibrant electric pinks, and contrasting yellow lights to create a moody, futuristic, Neo-Tokyo aesthetic.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
